reviews.review_title: one star because i cant give 0
reviews.review_description: i downloaded this app years ago and it wasn't good then and turns out it still isn't. Every time i add something it deletes something else from the build, sometimes only partially like a picture frame but the picture is missing. Other times entire items like i add a toilet on one side of the room and the sink and /or towel bar will disappear. Same thing happens with lights,doors,windows,textures, etc... So disappointed because they had an opportunity to make something really good. Sidenote you are confined to the house with very little ability to make an outdoor space such as a deck or patio.😑
Used to be ok. Got worse. Now, always have trouble logging in and never remembers my login details now. So have to log in every time and even then it still won't let me log in every time.

Saw negative views so downloaded a little reluctantly. Managed to build out my whole house and get a great walk around of renovation we have planned. More furniture options would be great and also more precise wall measurements. Manual entry and internal room sizing etc. That being said it worked really well and more than happy with the £14.99.

I was hoping I could use this app to work on a home renovation project.  Turns out, this isn't really THAT kind of app.  You cannot edit walls -- you either draw them perfectly or erase them and start over.   God forbid you would want to edit a particular wall earlier in the design.  Ain't gonna happen.  I didn't even get to the furnishing/decorating stages because these flaws are so basic as to make this app unusable for what I needed it for.   They really ought to change the way this app is marketed in the store.

reviews.review_title: What's going on with this app?
reviews.review_description:
Scroll down to the link provided for this app… The home page shows Mobile and desktop versions...They make no mention of the VR version whatsoever. This app states that you can import projects made in the Mobile version so I went and bought that. There is a menu for imports in this app…. But no directions on how that’s done. I connected the Quest 2 to the PC and there was not a folder for the app to put project imports. This is listed as a feature and there is ZERO documentation about it… because the app is not even mentioned.

Smooth Locomotion should not be absent from an app that let’s you “walk around your creation”.
Being forced to draw your home on a 1 meter grid made it possible to make my own home… so I bought the Mobile app for that and can’t get any questions answered because there is not information about this app anywhere.

I do hope they fix these things because this app was very interesting and could be very useful.

The app looks great. I liked that the lights have an effect. The objects are modeled well and there are plenty of things you can use. I’m always interested in any sort of collaborative creative app so I’m anxious to explore that aspect of it. Please publish documentation on your website on how to use the Import feature. This app has a lot of potential.

-update-
But after attempting to reach out to them for help just to get it to work as advertised, they just don’t respond. Waste of my time and money. Retracting my 5 stars. I bought the Steam version, the iOS version and none of it is working together like they claim.
It logged me out, won't let me back in. Won't update the Facebook code. Says it sent me a password reset, but doesn't. I want my money back.

I can't add a staircase to the second floor I hope that the app's administrators will make the design and furniture more realistic. Because it doesn't look real. So. We want it like other applications, more realistic and illuminating and similar colors, including enviz and others. In addition to hoping to add the feature of controlling the joys of things manually and each side separately. 

Please read my comment from those who are working on these features and thank you 
If read, please respond to my comment so I can be sure someone is listening to me.

I got the app to import my projects from PC. But I had no progress trying to import. I can see the project and click to import with or without furniture, but nothing happens.

I also tried to download a community project, but nothing, the app just stay showing me the menu.

A piece of garbage. Requested refund.
Can't login keeps saying email address not found or password is wrong even though all information is right.dont know if anyone else is having this issue
The annoying thing is that you need to log in and nothing works, even Facebook. They should be ashamed to throw such garbage. Total amateurism.

reviews.review_title: The Audacity to Charge For This…
reviews.review_description:
I bought this expecting to do what it advertised, and boy was I wrong. There’s virtually no customization, no snap-to-grid, and and embarrassing low supply of options to “build with” or “where”.  There’s so many blueprints for this type of editing tool that they could have immulated, idk how it’s so bad. 

If this was free I would have deleted and forgot all about it. $20 deserves a review though. The fact that theyre charging for an unbelievably empty app that’s been around for a long time is insane.

Make it better, or make it free.

I've been playing this game for awhile. Love the concept of building and furnishings. I like using my creativity. I wanted to give this game 5 stars but have to settle giving it 3 stars. I wish you can do more outside of the house.  Like adding a porch or a roof. A lawn would be nice, a backyard,  a pool, etc. Also I wish I was able to break ground to add a basement to the house. Please make More upgrades.
Basically, I'd just rather refund my money. Designs are done by 10" increments.... why not half-inch increments? Freezes up all the time. Imports from mobile version are all off. Scales are terrible.

reviews.review_title: I CAN NOT FCKING LOG IN!!!!!
reviews.review_description: THIS SUCKS.  YOU ARE GODXAMN THIEVES

reviews.review_title: Review of the App: Home Design 3D
reviews.review_description:
**Review of the App: Home Design 3D**

I've been using this app, and while it shows a lot of potential, there are several frustrating issues that need addressing for an optimal experience. 

Firstly, the sign-in issues are particularly troubling. I frequently find myself logged out, and when I try to sign in again, the button simply doesn’t work. This cumbersome process can be a significant barrier to using the app effectively, especially when you’re in the middle of a design project.

Moreover, the limitations in adjusting dimensions are disappointing. Users should have the flexibility to input specific wall heights and lengths, but this app does not allow that. This lack of customizability undermines the entire purpose of design software. Additionally, placing objects anywhere you want is crucial for creating realistic layouts, but the app falls short here as well. The absence of snap features and orthogonal locking when rotating objects is a major setback. It would greatly benefit users to have precise control, especially when lining objects up with each other on both the x and y axes.

The app's performance can be frustrating too. It occasionally freezes or gets glitchy, making it difficult to proceed smoothly with design tasks. These technical issues create a less-than-ideal user experience.

Despite these setbacks, I believe this app could be amazing if these flaws were fixed. Expanding the inventory to include more objects would certainly enhance its utility. Furthermore, introducing the ability to create custom shelving and cabinets would allow users to unleash their creativity to a greater extent.

In summary, while using this app it has a solid foundational concept and usability, the sign-in troubles, limited customization options, performance glitches, and lack of inventory variety hinder its overall effectiveness. Addressing these issues could transform it into an exceptional tool for designers.

developer_response.body:
Hello👋,

Our application is called Home Design 3D, not Room Designer. Does your comment actually refer to Home Design 3D?

Best regards.

reviews.review_description:
I left the review below a few years ago, and I want to say thank you for the updates and improvements. I have been enjoying this app.

Is there an update coming? Are you guys on Discord? We are limited to objects like table lamps, wall decor, etc. Some objects could be versatile if we could scale and pick them up.

*******************************************
This application could be better for the price I paid for it. It could be 100% better if we had a slide feature and able to listen to our own music. Most similar game apps have those features at least. I wholeheartedly understand your vision to keep this an interior design focused app, but for the price, we should have a bit more advantage over the environment music, skyboxes, pick up items; hold them  and nature sounds. These suggestions have nothing to do with your interior design vision. 

I bought Home Design 3d Outdoors thinking it was able to merge with Home Design 3Dvr  and it's not. I'm  so disappointed and hoping my gaming experience here gets better seeing I think this app has so much potential.

developer_response.body:
Hello 👋 
Thank you for your support and feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying the updates. We always appreciate suggestions like these and will keep them in mind for future improvements. Stay tuned for updates! 😊

reviews.review_description: This is a good app for getting ideas about how a room design may work out. You cannot do exact measurements and there are a few usability glitches but it is a budget design app. If you want something to use in a professional setting then you’re probably going to need to pay more than £15. I would like to see some Quest 3 graphical updates but other than that it does a good job.

reviews.review_title: Where did all my houses go 😭
reviews.review_description:
Love the app! Been using it for quite some time and have built several houses, but suddenly they are all gone except the ones I saved to the community 😔

A few suggestions... I would love to be able to change the wall thickness. When painting the walls I would love to be able to do a tile by tile like you can do on the floor so I could create a wainscoat effect or you could add a couple of wainscoting wallpapers. A hue picker color wheel in the paint selection would be ideal.

developer_response.body:
Hello 👋

We are sorry to hear that you couldn't find you previous projects. Could you please contact us via support so that we can assist you to the fullest: support@homedesign3d.net

Best regards 😊

reviews.review_description:
The potential is definitely there, but there are some problems. My guess is that this was originally a non-US product adapted for the US market, and it shows. The biggest issue is with the measurements—they’re off. For example, when you create a room, it gives you dimensions in feet and inches, but these don’t align with their key, which states that each square on the grid equals 1' 8". This leads to inaccurate measurements and a lot of frustration.

On top of that, the controls can feel clunky and counterintuitive at times. The selection of items to place in your home is quite limited, and the colors don’t always match the preview image, which is disappointing. Some of this might just be a learning curve, but the overall interface could definitely be more user-friendly.

It feels more like an early draft of the game that still needs significant refinement. There’s so much potential here, and I really hope the developers take the time to polish it further.

It logged me out and will not let me back in!!!!
Super frustrating! I have tried everything 😡

developer_response.body:
Hello 👋

We are sorry to hear that you had trouble logging in. Could you please contact us via support so that we can assist you to the fullest: support@homedesign3d.net

Best regards 😊

reviews.review_description: I'm a contractor by trade and really wanted to love this. It's beyond annoying and am going to try and get a refund. Plus why can't I choose my scale or build beyond 78 ft?
I always have to log in when I launch the application. The same problem is that when I switch between projects, the application always asks me to log in. So unfortunately it is unusable.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We are sorry to hear that you are experiencing difficulties with Home Design 3D VR. Could you please contact us via support so that we can assist you to the fullest: support@homedesign3d.net

Best regards.

reviews.review_description:
The application seems to be easy enough and I enjoy the process but the scale in meter is off, and defeats the purpose of the app.

Will this be fix?

For a room or 2, it works. If you want to design a house, forget about it. 

Pros:
Easy to lay out walls, throw in pre-made furniture, and step into VR to look around. 

Cons:
Cannot stretch rooms or walls. Must manually destroy walls an rebuild. Tedious if you just want to shove rooms over a bit. 

Staircase could not be stretched. 
Very hard time positioning windows. Or anything else for that matter. 

This looks like a promising framework that was never completed nor polished. 

Cost should be about 7 or so. 

Fun to experiment with, but it will probably not accomplish what you really want.

reviews.review_title: Too Basic To Be Useful For Serious Work
reviews.review_description:
I had questions about the app and customer support was horrible. They seemed very incompetent and basically just sent me to YouTube to do my own research about their product. When I persisted in getting answers, they sent me false information and sent me on a wild goose chase. I finally recorded a video of my question and sent it to them. I didn't hear anything back from them for a long time until after the return window was closed.

My question was about roof tools and how to make a shed style roof as well as how to specifically set dimensions on walls. One question was not answered regarding setting dimensions, and here was the final reply about the roof tools:

"We are sorry for confusion and delay, on the VR version of App these is no roof tool/object for now, our teams work to add more options and we hope we can add lot off new features soon, but for now no roof in VR sorry."

reviews.review_title: Good idea ruined by awful implementation
reviews.review_description:
This app just does everything to anger you from the moment you open it:

- horrible login implementation, not that I should even have to create an account. Server errors, poor field input, fb connection requires another device. Nearly gave up there.

creating a room is like pulling teeth, now have this hollow dull pain in my gut it’s so bad and frustrating. Draw walls in .5m increments? Can’t adjust roof height. Scale in one way here and a totally different worse way in the room.

select a door, can’t change handle position. Default height is 2.4m😂 can’t change colour. put a 3 pane window in, it puts a different one in. 

I put a sofa in and tried to rotate it, surprise, different method again to rotate. Why can’t your scale gizmo just handle rotation too? 

Sorry but this is just awful. Shame as I would love to be able to design layouts for my house, but this app is not fit for purpose.

reviews.review_title: Date Night Disaster, but Solo is decent.
reviews.review_description:
Bought this app 2x for the wife and I to have a date night organizing a room. It sounds like a great idea. Unfortunately, it didn't happen. I created a room and tried to host a multi-room and nothing happened. It allows for a room code entry but we can't create a room to even attempt to join. 

I played a bit more in Single player and it was as expected. It just could've been a great way to get the wife into VR and it flopped.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you so much for using our app! 
We are sorry to hear that you couldn't make the multiplayer work. We will look into it.

Sincerely,
The Home Design 3D team

reviews.review_description:
The concept is great, being able to link the mobile app with virtual reality is great and the paint and design interactions are nice.

However, there are a lot of bugs in the application. For example, I can't place a ceiling light on the first floor of my house. Also, when there are too many items (maybe 15-20) placed in the same session the application freezes and it is no longer possible to place new furniture. 

There is also the difficulty of transferring items from Mobile to VR, even the items indicated as present in the VR version are not always transferred.

Also, there are not enough staircase possibilities, I can't go up and down floors easily because I couldn't put one in my house. Collision management is also quite complicated.

Then, there is for the moment only a few choices of decoration elements, the customization is rather limited (from 1 to 4 colours available), it's impossible to make a symetry on objects and it's only possible to enlarge an element in its totality.

Finally, even if the colouring of walls is already quite advanced, It could be interesting to add the possibility to paint half a wall.

In future versions, it would also be interesting to add the customisation of the exterior and a smaller scale when creating walls.

All in all, the application is interesting but still needs some work to become excellent.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you for your very constructive feedback!
We do note down your comments and propositions.
We will have a look at the issues you are having concerning the import of items in VR.
And...smaller scale for walls are coming ! ;)

reviews.review_description: Used to be 1 of my favourites now its got this random line bar thing above my eyes saw another review about this issue and developers advised if avatar is wear glasses this is why but its not ive tried everything even down to making my avatar bald with no eyebrows! And its still there its not playable with this issue as it hurts your eyes! Please fix this issue

I gave it a high rating previously but I changed my mind because of how many times my projects have been deleted. I’ve redone so many and they just keep going missing. Very fun but for the price I paid I’m not too happy

Awesome game. Can design for hours. It is so fun. Feeds my architect wired mind. Allows me to put my ideas and mental images on the vr. Thank you for this wonderful game. Hoping in the future you can purchase add ons with more options, like selections on outside envirnment,  oustide landscaping, add on furniture for inside and outside etc...

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thank you so much for using our app and for your positive feedback!
Have an excellent day,
The Home Design 3D VR team

reviews.review_description: This app is nothing like people are saying about it, nor is description accurate. Remove spaces and fix oculus name also add dot and com after oculus.

w w w . 0culus / appr eferr als / aitorgon zalezmj / 35 210 567 2468 44 24 /

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: I love to create and build homes, I could spend hours doing this. I have a few suggestions.  I think the ability to design landscape, flowers, trees, and water features. Add on features like farmhouse style, contemporary, boho, modern contemporary. I would pay to add some of these features.

developer_response.body:
Hello ! 
Thank you for using our app and for your positive review ! We are glad you like our app!
Concerning all landscape, nature design and all other exterior building, we are for now still a bit restricted by the device. We prefer for now to focus on delivering the best experience as smoothly as we can, which means focusing on designing the home in itself.
Though, we note down your comment, which is already listed as future possible improvements of our app!
Have an excellent day,
The Home Design 3D team

reviews.review_title: Nice idea, but at this moment unusable
reviews.review_description:
I tried to draw our house and apartment but unfortunately this is impossible. This is why:

1. I need at least a 10cm scale for walls, not 1 meter. 
2. Our appartement is quite old so has a lot of walls in strange angle’s. I can’t recreate the room if I can only draw 4x4 square walls.
3. Windows and doors should be resizable in height and width. The aspect ratio is always locked so my simple white window of 70 x 1.70 is impossible to draw
4. Furniture and objects need an mirror option, doors move the wrong way
5. Our house has an old wooden ceiling that has some pilars for support. Unable to draw, tried to use the arches but those can only be placed in a wall
6. I need measurements information when resizing objects and furniture. E.g. I can make my dining table fit in the room, but what are the actual dimensions?
7. Should be possible to choose wall thickness. Or at least 5 sizes.
8. Simple white doors and windows are missing 
9. My VR project is not accessible from the web or windows version

Stil a lot of bugs when navigating, when switching to mixed reality your lost, no option to turn back.

Not (yet) worth my money.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you for all these great feedbacks. We noted down each return so we can keep improving the app!

However, could you be more precise concerning the bugs you encounter when switching to mixed reality ? What happens exactly ? And after what actions do they occur ?
You can reply to us at this adress : community@homedesign3d.net
Thank you very much.

reviews.review_description: After decorating all of the provided rooms, I am off designing a home!!

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you a lot for using our app and for your positive feedback!
Enjoy!

The Home Design 3D team

reviews.review_description: I just recently downloaded this app I love it  finally I can make my dream house here I have one question it's possible to watch television on it I have imported television set but its not working .

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for your feedback, we are glad you enjoy the experience! Unfortunatly, it is not possible to watch TV on the TV sets you install in your project in the app. Maybe it is a feature that we could work on in the future!
The Home Design 3D VR team

reviews.review_description: A great app to visualize how new arrangements in my new flat would look like !
